description_long: This is a cylindrical trash bin with a faceted exterior, commonly seen in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and alleys. The bin features a removable, flat lid with a prominent, integrated handle on top for easy lifting. Two side-mounted handles are present, allowing for convenient carrying or emptying. The surface appears to be made of molded plastic or metal, with a matte, slightly textured finish. There are no visible wheels or labeling on the exterior, giving it a utilitarian and unmarked appearance. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for outdoor waste collection.
description: A cylindrical, faceted trash bin with a flat removable lid and integrated handles, made of matte plastic or metal. It is unmarked and designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid with a central top handle and one visible side handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the faceted body and the absence of visible handles or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the top handle and opposite side handle visible.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, showing the plain faceted surface without handles.
